steps.title: Explain the similar responses
steps.content: Both human-caused sound conditions reduced deep dives, but adding sonic pulses to ship sounds produced negligible differences. The completion must explain why the added pulses changed little.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A discusses depth of sound travel; Choice C contradicts negligible differences; Choice D addresses overall sensitivity, not similarity between exposure types. Choice B says ship sounds dominate the auditory environment, leaving little additional effect from pulses. The answer is B.
